name: Brian AI Composer Clean Rebuild
changes: Removes the V11.6.4 composer hotfix and its injected assets
Rebuilds the Brian AI input guard from the wide footer container instead of the collapsed textarea parent
Repairs textarea, text input, and contenteditable composers
Detects and neutralizes grid, flex, absolute-position, min-content, and vertical-writing conflicts
Keeps the repair scoped to the Brian AI floating panel
